violations.text: The doors to the outside are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The cold drawers were observed non-functional at the time of inspection, with food held on ice. PIC stated that repair and/or new unit is scheduled for tomorrow. Foods were moved to alternative refrigeration. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
Trash and debris were observed in the common areas around the dumpster area. Refuse areas are to be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and debris: -walk-in gaskets -beverage tubing covering (in walk-in) -floor/wall junctures in basement storage area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Coving near basement stairs observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

Sanitizer and wash buckets were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Buckets removed during inspections. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
The door to the prep unit was not in good repair. Inspector observed interior panel missing and exposed insulation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the 3 bay sink area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
